issues.summary: [Remnant] On DSP form for 2023 immersive banner add left/right toggle and burn in logo depending on selection
issues.description:
On DSP form [https://dsp.samsungads.com/b/323/creatives/new/stv_first_screen_masthead](https://dsp.samsungads.com/b/323/creatives/new/stv_first_screen_masthead) for Masthead Type “2023 Immersive Banner” add below toggle 

![](blob:https://media.staging.atl-paas.net/?type=file&localId=056ad0b1b41e&id=5a4de32e-32fe-4a51-b178-8c10fdcb2df9&&collection=&height=109&occurrenceKey=null&width=495&__contextId=null&__displayType=null&__external=false&__fileMimeType=null&__fileName=null&__fileSize=null&__mediaTraceId=null&url=null)
It should be below “CTA Button Theme” toggle.

When toggle is selected to “Left” a logo burn-in script should burn in logo on the left (all specs like for standard logo burn in but mirrored, so the distance of logo from right border of background image should become distance from left border)

issues.summary: [DSP] Add functionality to select Microsite on the form, save it and show it in the details view
issues.description: As a user, I want to have the ability to choose the Microsite item in the Click Action dropdown for the Spotlight Row and Spotlight Beacon creatives. There should also be the ability to set Microsite URL and ignore values for Country and App names.

issues.summary: [Remnant] Test Left Aligned CTA button for Remnant 2023 on TV and using Ad Response generator
issues.description:
As Product Owner i want to test, if creative of type “Banner 1824x412” created using DSP form [https://dsp.samsungads.com/b/323/creatives/new/stv_first_screen_masthead](https://dsp.samsungads.com/b/323/creatives/new/stv_first_screen_masthead) with “Masthead Type” = “2023 Immersive Banner” can be displayed with Left Aligned CTA button.

1. DSP - currently forms for “2023 Immersive Banner” as well as “Banner 1824x421” masthead types have missing button as below:

    ![](blob:https://media.staging.atl-paas.net/?type=file&localId=9f5a6c081f41&id=287dfcd5-082d-4d93-9129-755278084f3a&&collection=&height=87&occurrenceKey=null&width=396&__contextId=null&__displayType=null&__external=false&__fileMimeType=null&__fileName=null&__fileSize=null&__mediaTraceId=null&url=null)
2. Restore this button locally for “2023 Immersive Banner” as well as “Banner 1824x421”  masthead types
3. Refer to <custom data-type="smartlink" data-id="id-0">https://adgear.atlassian.net/browse/PEDC-4323</custom> to make sure TV receives correct data for TV to display CTA button on left 
4. Build 4 creatives: for 2 types “2023 Immersive Banner” and “Banner 1824x421”, and for 2 “Logo & CTA Button Position”  options: “Left” and “Right”
5. Push the ads through audit to Tizen 7.0 TV and visually confirm the button is on the left/right (as set in DSP form) and does not collide with TV UI elements like navbar

All should be done locally if possible - this ticket is also a “test of a test” - to see if we’re already capable to run E2E check if certain code change will bring expected results on TV

Acceptance criteria:

* Test results in form of Tizen 7.0 TV Screenshots of audited ads and their ad response/ad request saved to files and  attatched to this ticket

Contact points: Eng: <custom data-type="mention" data-id="id-1">@Raju C</custom> <custom data-type="mention" data-id="id-2">@Shujie Fan</custom> Product: <custom data-type="mention" data-id="id-3">@Haaris Khan</custom>

issues.summary: [DSP-UI] Add new click action "QR Code Microsite"
issues.description:
As a DSP user on 2022-2026 forms for Masthead experiences i want new click action QR Code Microsite” so that I can use QR Code microsite template without remembering microsite URL

‌

Functional requirements:

1. New option on “Click Action” dropdown - “Shoppable Microsite”
2. When “Shoppable Microsite” is selected a new field Target URL is created.
3. When “Shoppable Microsite” is selected a text field “Target URL” should appear. URL typed here should be url encoded added to “Microsite URL” field as URL query parameter so JS on microsite can read it

Acceptance criteria:

* all functional requirements are implemented correctly

General UI (mock says Click action Shoppable Microsite but actually should be QR Code Microsite):

![](blob:https://media.staging.atl-paas.net/?type=file&localId=null&id=c5e943b0-d577-44f6-9f3e-618774219816&&collection=&height=262&occurrenceKey=null&width=639&__contextId=null&__displayType=null&__external=false&__fileMimeType=null&__fileName=null&__fileSize=null&__mediaTraceId=null&url=null)
After user entered Target URL (mock says Click action Microsite but actually should be QR Code Microsite):

![](blob:https://media.staging.atl-paas.net/?type=file&localId=null&id=7602003c-d799-4941-9465-d7e81a1a2e11&&collection=&height=269&occurrenceKey=null&width=644&__contextId=null&__displayType=null&__external=false&__fileMimeType=null&__fileName=null&__fileSize=null&__mediaTraceId=null&url=null)
‌

Final state after automatically appending url encoded target url (mock says Click action Microsite but actually should be QR Code Microsite)

![](blob:https://media.staging.atl-paas.net/?type=file&localId=null&id=d61b5b4e-9606-4643-a579-2a478653a4e2&&collection=&height=263&occurrenceKey=null&width=637&__contextId=null&__displayType=null&__external=false&__fileMimeType=null&__fileName=null&__fileSize=null&__mediaTraceId=null&url=null)
Task should be done with proper payload
